query:
=== Recent conversation (last 0 exchanges) ===
[tool: Bash(git checkout -b bugfix/476-co-access-promotion-quarantine-filter) → Switched to a new branch 'bugfix/476-co-access-promotion-quarantine-filter']
[tool: mcp__unimatrix__context_cycle(phase-end) → Acknowledged: phase_ended for topic 'bugfix-476'. Attribution is applied via the hook path (fire-and-forget). Use context_cycle_review to confirm session attribution.]
[tool: Bash(gh issue create --title "hygiene: add quarantine guard at co_access write time to prevent stale-pair accumulation" --bod) → https://github.com/dug-21/unimatrix/issues/477]
[Assistant] Weight update path confirmed clean: `promote_one_direction` reads from `GRAPH_EDGES` only (not `co_access`), and it's only called for rows returned by the outer SELECT. Once the quarantine filter is on the SELECT, neither INSERT nor UPDATE fires for quarantined-endpoint pairs. That audit item closes.

Filing the follow-up issue now, then advancing to Phase 2.
=== End recent conversation ===

entries.title: co_access promotion SELECT missing quarantine-status filter causes compaction/promotion oscillation
co_access write-time path has no quarantine guard — correctness relies solely on tick-side JOIN filter
UsageDedup shared access_counted set across AccessSource variants — weight-0 dedup bypass required
